components.name: system formatter row right
components.description: to start a new row and fill from right the following components in one row until the row end is triggered

components.name: system show field name
components.description: show the object name as read only text

components.name: system formatter row end
components.description: to close the previous opened row and show the components collected since the start in one row

views.name: test view with an unclosed row
views.description: a view that opens a row with row_right but never closes it to test the row balance check
